rationale_source: F1 aggregation cosigner per Layer 3 #8 recommended-default (a) cosigner as additional canonical field. ARCHITECTURE-AMENDMENT-CANDIDATE cross-listed.

cosigner_name.rationale: Cosigner in extraText. Per Layer 3 #8 (a): canonical_map should have cosigner_name field; ARCHITECTURE-AMENDMENT if missing.

annual_income.rationale: F1.AI combined for DSCR ($78k primary + $145k cosigner = $223k). Architecture-amendment if cosigner_income not tracked separately.

cosigner_present.rationale: Per Layer 3 #8 (a): cosigner flagged distinct from co-applicant.
